text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #5)
Thank-you for your enquiry.  Unfortunately I must defer to others, as I decided to advise my firewalls to block spammers rather than delay our interaction and sparing kern.ipc.numopensockets.(In reply to Samee Shahzada from comment #0)
